cred_final_comment: The study is well reported and the endpoint seems plausible. However the EC10 of 1.6 µg/L is far below the NOEC of 128 µg/L, indicating a slow increaseofthe effect up to 128 µg/L, and then a rapid increase of the effect beyond.

This study is well reported and seems solid and well conducted. Exposure concentrations were analytically measured. Shortcomings are the missing description of ctls growth performance and in some cases the dose-response curve fit is poor (thus, case by case reliability assessment)
